_comment: Residual-extraction config. CLI args (--model_path, --layers, ...) override these. Env vars (UPPERCASE versions, e.g. LAYERS=10,30,50, MODEL_PATH=...) override the file but are themselves overridden by CLI.
_model_key_help: gemma4_31b or qwen36 — used for default samples_file path and HF-repo fallback if model_path is not local.
_model_path_help: Local path to the HF model snapshot. Leave null to auto-resolve to ./models/<repo-name> or HF cache. Run `python download_models.py` to fetch the weights.
_layers_help: Layer-spec syntax: 'middle' | 'early' | 'late' | int | 'i,j,k' | 'start:stop:step' | 'all'. Indexes into hidden_states (0 = embeddings, 1..n_layers = transformer block outputs).
_dtype_help: Storage dtype on disk: 'fp16' (~2 bytes/value) or 'bf16'. fp16 halves disk vs fp32 with negligible probe-AUC impact.
